cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the square dance after all these partner switches. Let me start by listing the initial partners and then track each switch step by step. First, the starting partners are: - Alice with Helga - Bob with Jamie - Claire with Ophelia - Dave with Karl - Eve with Rodrigo Now, the problem says there are several partner switches. Let me go through each one carefully. First switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. So, Eve was with Rodrigo, and Bob was with Jamie. After switching, Eve will be with Jamie, and Bob will be with Rodrigo. Let me update the list: After first switch: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Karl - Eve: Jamie Second switch: Dave and Claire switch partners.
